chunks.title: Ben-Hadad's Siege and Ahab's Resistance
chunks.reason: Complete narrative unit covering the initial siege demands, Ahab's negotiation with elders, and the final defiant exchange.

chunks.title: The First Victory at Aphek
chunks.reason: Coherent story unit containing the prophet's oracle, the mobilization of troops, and the successful battle against Aram.

chunks.title: The Second Battle and Ahab's Mercy
chunks.reason: Complete narrative arc detailing the Aramean strategy shift, the second victory, and Ahab sparing Ben-Hadad.

chunks.title: The Prophet's Parable of Judgment
chunks.reason: Self-contained allegorical story where a prophet tests another to deliver a specific judgment against the king.
